info.title: RadioShaq API
info.description: Strategic Autonomous Ham Radio and Knowledge Operations Dispatch System

get.description: Liveness probe.
Readiness probe: DB (if configured), orchestrator, optional audio agent.

Prometheus scrape endpoint. Exposes radioshaq_uptime_seconds, radioshaq_callsigns_registered_total,
and optional GPU gauges (when nvidia-smi is available). Install prometheus-client for full metrics.

post.description: Create an access token (e.g. for field station).

schema.title: Response Create Token Auth Token Post

post.description: Exchange refresh token for new access token.

schema.title: Response Refresh Token Auth Refresh Post

get.description: Return current token claims (requires Bearer token).
Get propagation prediction between two points.
List supported bands (from effective band plan for config region).

Report whether a radio (CAT rig) is connected and/or SDR TX (HackRF) is configured.
When CAT is connected, include current frequency and mode. For live demos, check
sdr_tx_available to ensure HackRF TX path is enabled (real hardware when device attached).

schema.title: Response Radio Status Radio Status Get

post.description: Send arbitrary text as TTS over the radio (audio out).

schema.title: Response Send Tts Radio Send Tts Post

post.description:
Transmit an uploaded audio file over radio (CAT or SDR via radio_tx agent).

This is primarily for live demos where the client cannot reference server-local paths.

schema.title: Response Send Audio Radio Send Audio Post

post.description:
Store operator location. v1 strict: requires latitude and longitude.
If only location_text is provided, returns 400 with clarification.

get.description: Return latest stored location for callsign (explicit lat/lon).
Find operators within radius of a point (from persisted operator_locations).

schema.title: Response Get Operators Nearby Gis Operators Nearby Get

get.description: Return emergency coordination events that have a location, with lat/lon for map overlays.

parameters.name: since

schema.description: ISO timestamp; only events created_at >= since
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: ISO timestamp; only events created_at >= since

schema.title: Response Get Emergency Events With Locations Gis Emergency Events Get

get.description: Get core memory blocks (user, identity, ideaspace, system_instructions) for a callsign.

schema.title: Response Get Blocks Memory  Callsign  Blocks Get
Response Update Block Memory  Callsign  Blocks  Block Type  Put

post.description: Append content to a core block.

schema.title: Response Append Block Memory  Callsign  Blocks  Block Type  Append Post

get.description: Get daily summaries for a callsign (last `days` days).

schema.title: Response Get Summaries Memory  Callsign  Summaries Get

post.description:
Submit a message for REACT orchestration.
Requires orchestrator to be set in app state (lifespan).
Optional body fields: channel, chat_id, sender_id (InboundMessage shape for routing).

schema.title: Response Process Message Messages Process Post

post.description:
Whitelist entry point: request access to gated services (e.g. messaging between bands).
Text or audio → orchestrator evaluates → response as text and optionally TTS.
Accepts application/json: { "text" or "message", "callsign?", "send_audio_back?" }
or multipart/form-data: file (audio), callsign, send_audio_back.

Approved/message can come from either the orchestrator final message (tool path:
LLM used register_callsign tool and replied) or a completed whitelist agent task
(agent path: ACTING ran the whitelist agent; result in completed_tasks).

schema.title: Response Whitelist Request Messages Whitelist Request Post

post.description: Upload audio; run ASR; whitelist check; store transcript. Optionally inject to RX queue.

schema.title: Response Message From Audio Messages From Audio Post

post.description: Inject message into RX queue and store to DB (whitelist enforced).

schema.title: Response Inject And Store Messages Inject And Store Post

post.description:
Translate a message from one band to another and store both sides.

Scenario: User A emits on band A (e.g. 40m), message is received and stored;
then it is "relayed" to band B (e.g. 2m) for User B. Stores:
1. Original (or reference) transcript on source band
2. Relay transcript on target band with metadata linking to source

Body:
- message (str): Text to relay
- source_band (str): e.g. "40m"
- source_frequency_hz (float, optional): exact freq if known
- source_callsign (str): who sent on source band
- target_band (str): e.g. "2m"
- target_frequency_hz (float, optional): target freq; else use band default
- destination_callsign (str, optional): who receives on target band
- session_id (str, optional): default generated

schema.title: Response Relay Message Between Bands Messages Relay Post

get.description:
Search transcripts (received/relayed messages). Use for demo so User 2 can poll
for messages on a band or for their callsign (e.g. after relay from 40m to 2m).
For a callsign to poll their messages on a band: use callsign=<their_callsign>&destination_only=true&band=<band>.
Omit band to get messages across all bands.
When whitelist is configured, only transcripts whose source/destination is in the whitelist are returned.

parameters.name: callsign

schema.description: Filter by source or destination callsign
schema.title: Callsign

parameters.description: Filter by source or destination callsign

parameters.name: band

schema.description: Filter by band name (e.g. 40m, 2m); uses extra_data.band
schema.title: Band

parameters.description: Filter by band name (e.g. 40m, 2m); uses extra_data.band

parameters.name: destination_only

schema.description: If True and callsign set, return only transcripts where callsign is destination
schema.title: Destination Only

parameters.description: If True and callsign set, return only transcripts where callsign is destination

get.description: Get a single transcript by id (for play or display).

schema.title: Response Get Transcript Transcripts  Transcript Id  Get

post.description: Load transcript, generate TTS, and send over radio (audio out).

schema.title: Response Play Transcript Over Radio Transcripts  Transcript Id  Play Post

get.description: List all registered callsigns (whitelist).

post.description: Register a callsign so it is automatically accepted for store/relay.

schema.title: Response Register Callsign Callsigns Register Post

post.description: Upload audio; run ASR and register the extracted or confirmed callsign.

schema.title: Response Register From Audio Callsigns Register From Audio Post

patch.description: Set preferred_bands for a registered callsign. Band names must be in effective band plan (e.g. 40m, 2m).

schema.title: Response Patch Callsign Bands Callsigns Registered  Callsign  Patch

delete.description: Remove a callsign from the registry.

schema.title: Response Unregister Callsign Callsigns Registered  Callsign  Delete

get.description: Get contact preferences for a registered callsign (§8.1).

schema.title: Response Get Contact Preferences Callsigns Registered  Callsign  Contact Preferences Get

patch.description: Set contact preferences (notify by SMS/WhatsApp when a message is left for this callsign). Sets consent_at when enabling notify_on_relay (§8.1).

schema.title: Response Patch Contact Preferences Callsigns Registered  Callsign  Contact Preferences Patch

post.description:
Create an emergency coordination event (status=pending). Only allowed when
emergency_contact is enabled and current region is in regions_allowed.

schema.title: Response Create Emergency Request Emergency Request Post

get.description:
Return the number of pending emergency events. Use this to inform the operator
(e.g. dashboard polling or script) that action is required; then list with GET /emergency/events.

schema.title: Response Emergency Pending Count Emergency Pending Count Get

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream of pending emergency count. Send event every 10s.
Operator UI can subscribe to trigger audio and browser notifications when count > 0.
List coordination events with event_type=emergency. Optional filter by status (e.g. pending, approved, rejected).

schema.title: Response List Emergency Events Emergency Events Get

post.description:
Approve an emergency event and queue the SMS/WhatsApp for outbound delivery.
Sets status=approved, records approved_at/approved_by/queued_at, and returns queued state.

schema.title: Response Approve Emergency Event Emergency Events  Event Id  Approve Post

post.description: Reject an emergency event (do not send). Sets status=rejected and records rejected_at, rejected_by.

schema.title: Response Reject Emergency Event Emergency Events  Event Id  Reject Post

post.description:
Inject a message into the RX path for demo/testing.

The message will be available to receivers (radio_rx / digital_modes)
when they poll the injection queue. Unless inject_skip_bus is True,
also publish to MessageBus so the orchestrator processes it.

schema.title: Response Inject Message Inject Message Post

post.description:
Accept upload from a remote receiver station.

Called by radioshaq.remote_receiver (SDR service) when HQ_URL points here.
Requires Bearer JWT. When receiver_upload_store is enabled, persists transcript
with band (from frequency). When receiver_upload_inject is enabled, injects
into the RX path after store.

schema.title: Response Receiver Upload Receiver Upload Post

post.description:
Accept an inbound message (e.g. from Lambda) and publish to MessageBus.
Body: channel, sender_id, chat_id, content; optional media, metadata, session_key_override.
Orchestrator consumer must be running elsewhere to process (e.g. run_inbound_consumer).

schema.title: Response Publish Inbound Internal Bus Inbound Post

post.description:
Record opt-out for notify-on-relay (§8.1). Call when user sends STOP via SMS/WhatsApp.
Provide either callsign or phone + channel (sms/whatsapp). Clears that contact and sets opt_out_at.
Requires a valid Bearer token (e.g. service JWT used by your Twilio webhook handler or Lambda).

schema.title: Response Opt Out Internal Opt Out Post

post.description: Inbound SMS webhook from Twilio.
Inbound WhatsApp webhook from Twilio.

get.description:
Get current audio configuration (env/file + optional runtime overrides).
Runtime overrides do not affect active agents until process restart.

schema.title: Response Get Audio Config Api V1 Config Audio Get

patch.description:
Update audio configuration (runtime overlay only; does not persist to file).
Restart required for changes to affect active agents (voice_rx, etc.).

post.description: Clear runtime audio config overrides. Restart required for agents to use file/env config.

get.description: List available audio input/output devices (requires voice_rx).

schema.title: Response List Audio Devices Api V1 Audio Devices Get

post.description:
Test that an audio device can be opened for playback and capture.

This performs a very short open/close cycle for the given device ID using sounddevice.
It does not play audible tones by design, but verifies that the OS/driver accept
a basic stream configuration for this device.

schema.title: Response Test Audio Device Api V1 Audio Devices  Device Id  Test Post

get.description: List pending responses awaiting human confirmation.

schema.title: Response List Pending Responses Api V1 Audio Pending Get

post.description: Approve a pending response (send it over the radio).

schema.title: Response Approve Pending Response Api V1 Audio Pending  Pending Id  Approve Post

post.description: Reject a pending response.

schema.title: Response Reject Pending Response Api V1 Audio Pending  Pending Id  Reject Post

get.description:
Get current LLM configuration (API keys redacted). Runtime overrides merged if set.
Runtime overrides do not affect active orchestrator/agents until process restart.

schema.title: Response Get Config Llm Api V1 Config Llm Get

patch.description:
Update LLM configuration (runtime overlay only; does not persist to file).
API keys in body are not stored. Restart required for changes to affect orchestrator/agents.

get.description:
Get current memory/Hindsight configuration. Runtime overrides merged if set.
Runtime overrides do not affect active components until process restart.

schema.title: Response Get Config Memory Api V1 Config Memory Get

patch.description:
Update memory configuration (runtime overlay only; does not persist to file).
Restart required for changes to affect active components.

get.description:
Get per-role LLM and memory overrides. Keys: orchestrator, judge, whitelist, daily_summary, memory.
Runtime overrides do not affect active orchestrator/agents until process restart.

schema.title: Response Get Config Overrides Api V1 Config Overrides Get

patch.description:
Update per-role overrides (runtime overlay only; does not persist to file).
Restart required for changes to affect orchestrator/agents.

text.title: Text
text.description: Message text to inject as received

audio_path.title: Audio Path
audio_path.description: Optional path to audio file (stored with transcript)

InjectMessageBody.title: InjectMessageBody
InjectMessageBody.description: Body for POST /inject/message (user injection for demo).

LocationResponse.title: LocationResponse
LocationResponse.description: Response for stored or retrieved location (explicit lat/lon, no raw geometry).

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Phone (E.164) to opt out; used if callsign not set

OptOutBody.title: OptOutBody
OptOutBody.description: Body for POST /internal/opt-out. Used by webhook when user sends STOP.

notify_sms_phone.title: Notify Sms Phone
notify_sms_phone.description: E.164; set to empty string to clear

notify_whatsapp_phone.title: Notify Whatsapp Phone
notify_whatsapp_phone.description: E.164; set to empty string to clear

notify_on_relay.title: Notify On Relay
notify_on_relay.description: Enable notify when a message is left for this callsign

consent_source.title: Consent Source
consent_source.description: api / web / voice; required when enabling notify_on_relay

consent_confirmed.title: Consent Confirmed
consent_confirmed.description: Explicit consent; required for EU/UK/ZA when enabling notify

location_text.title: Location Text
location_text.description: Free-text place (v1 strict: not used for storage alone)

PostLocationBody.title: PostLocationBody
PostLocationBody.description: Body for POST /gis/location. Provide either (latitude, longitude) or location_text (v1: text alone returns 400).

ReceiverUploadBody.title: ReceiverUploadBody
ReceiverUploadBody.description: Payload from a remote receiver station (SDR samples/decoded data).

target_band.title: Target Band
target_band.description: Target band (e.g. 2m) when target_channel=radio; ignored when target_channel is sms/whatsapp

deliver_at.title: Deliver At
deliver_at.description: ISO datetime when message should be delivered (optional)

target_channel.title: Target Channel
target_channel.description: Delivery channel: radio, sms, or whatsapp

destination_phone.title: Destination Phone
destination_phone.description: E.164 phone for SMS/WhatsApp when target_channel is sms or whatsapp

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.description: If true and target_channel is sms/whatsapp, queue for human approval (Section 9)

RelayBody.title: RelayBody
RelayBody.description: Body for POST /messages/relay (band translation or SMS/WhatsApp).
